name: Humedal de Saldropo y Cascada Uguna — circular trailrunning por el Parque Natural de Gorbeia
region_intro: Jogging around Zeanuri offers diverse routes through the Gorbeia Natural Park, a region characterized by rugged topography, prominent peaks, and dense beech forests. The landscape is further shaped by extensive natural pastures, significant wetlands like Saldropo, and mountainous chains irrigated by the Arratia River. This varied terrain provides numerous opportunities for runners to explore the natural beauty of the Basque Country. Best jogging routes around Zeanuri The most popular jogging route is Itxina Natural Monument Loop Trail, a 6.5 miles (10.5 km) difficult trail that takes 1 hour 40 minutes to complete, traversing a protected biotope. Another top favourite among local runners is Humedal de Saldropo y Cascada Uguna — circular trailrunning por el Parque Natural de Gorbeia, a moderate 3.5 miles (5.6 km) path. This route explores the beautiful Saldropo Wetland and leads to the Uguna Waterfall. Local runners also love the Gorbea Summit Cross loop from Zeanuri, a 19.9 miles (32.1 km) trail leading through the mountainous terrain towards Mount Gorbea, often completed in about 5 hours 27 minutes. Jogging around Zeanuri is defined by the expansive Gorbeia Natural Park, dense beech forests, and varied mountainous chains. The network offers options for different ability levels, from moderate wetland loops to challenging summit ascents. The routes in Zeanuri are highly rated by the komoot community with an average score of 4.75 stars from over 5 reviews. More than 1000 runners have used komoot to explore Zeanuri's varied terrain.
region_faq:
Q: How many running routes are available in Zeanuri?
A: Zeanuri offers a diverse network of around 15 running routes, catering to various skill levels. These trails wind through the stunning Gorbeia Natural Park, providing ample opportunities to explore the region's natural beauty.

Q: Are there any easy jogging routes suitable for beginners or families in Zeanuri?
A: While many routes are moderate to difficult, a popular and accessible option is the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1059023547/humedal-de-saldropo-y-cascada-uguna-circular-trailrunning-por-el-parque-natural-de-gorbeia" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Humedal de Saldropo y Cascada Uguna — circular trailrunning por el Parque Natural de Gorbeia&lt;/a&gt;. This moderate 5.6 km (3.5 miles) circular path explores the beautiful Saldropo Wetland and leads to the Uguna Waterfall, making it a great choice for a more relaxed run.

Q: What are the most challenging running trails around Zeanuri for advanced runners?
A: For experienced runners seeking a challenge, Zeanuri offers several demanding trails. The &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/6976746" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Gorbea Summit Cross loop from Zeanuri&lt;/a&gt; is a difficult 32.1 km (19.9 miles) route with significant elevation gain, leading towards Mount Gorbea. Another challenging option is the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1058694733/itxina-natural-monument-loop-trail" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Itxina Natural Monument Loop Trail&lt;/a&gt;, a 10.5 km (6.5 miles) difficult trail traversing a protected biotope.

Q: Are there any circular running routes in the Zeanuri area?
A: Yes, many of Zeanuri's running routes are circular, allowing you to start and finish at the same point. A notable example is the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1059023547/humedal-de-saldropo-y-cascada-uguna-circular-trailrunning-por-el-parque-natural-de-gorbeia" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Humedal de Saldropo y Cascada Uguna — circular trailrunning por el Parque Natural de Gorbeia&lt;/a&gt;, which offers a scenic loop through the Saldropo Wetland.

Q: What kind of natural landscapes can I expect to see while running in Zeanuri?
A: Running in Zeanuri immerses you in the diverse landscapes of the Gorbeia Natural Park. You'll encounter rugged topography, dense beech forests, extensive natural pastures, and significant wetlands like Saldropo. The region is also characterized by mountainous chains and is irrigated by the Arratia River, offering varied and picturesque scenery.

Q: Are there any waterfalls or unique natural monuments to see along the running trails?
A: Absolutely! The region is rich in natural beauty. You can visit the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/3009759" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Uguzpe Waterfall&lt;/a&gt;, or explore the Itxina Natural Monument, which features challenging trails and unique geological formations. The &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1059023547/humedal-de-saldropo-y-cascada-uguna-circular-trailrunning-por-el-parque-natural-de-gorbeia" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Humedal de Saldropo y Cascada Uguna&lt;/a&gt; route specifically leads to the Uguna Waterfall.

Q: What do other runners say about the trails in Zeanuri?
A: The running routes in Zeanuri are highly regarded by the komoot community, with an average rating of 4.75 stars from over 5 reviews. Runners often praise the stunning natural scenery, the variety of terrain, and the well-maintained trails within the Gorbeia Natural Park.

Q: Are there any cultural or historical attractions near the running routes in Zeanuri?
A: Beyond the natural beauty, Zeanuri offers cultural points of interest. The &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/628313" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Urkiola Sanctuary&lt;/a&gt; is a significant religious site located within the natural park. You can also find traditional Basque country houses and historical buildings in the municipality.

Q: What is the best season for jogging or trail running in Zeanuri?
A: Zeanuri is an excellent destination for outdoor activities year-round. However, spring and autumn offer particularly pleasant temperatures and vibrant natural colors, making them ideal for jogging. Summer can be warm, but the dense forests provide shade, while winter runs can be beautiful, though some higher trails might require appropriate gear for colder conditions.

Q: Are the running trails in Zeanuri suitable for dogs?
A: Many trails within the Gorbeia Natural Park are dog-friendly, allowing you to enjoy a run with your canine companion. It's always recommended to keep dogs on a leash, especially in natural park areas, to protect wildlife and ensure a pleasant experience for all users.

Q: What kind of elevation changes can I expect on the running routes?
A: The terrain around Zeanuri, being part of the Gorbeia Natural Park, features significant elevation changes. While some routes like the Saldropo Wetland loop have minimal gain, others, such as the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/6976746" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Gorbea Summit Cross loop from Zeanuri&lt;/a&gt;, involve over 2000 meters of ascent, offering challenging climbs and descents.

Q: How long do the running routes typically take to complete?
A: The duration of runs in Zeanuri varies greatly depending on the route and your pace. Shorter, moderate trails like the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1059023547/humedal-de-saldropo-y-cascada-uguna-circular-trailrunning-por-el-parque-natural-de-gorbeia" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Saldropo Wetland and Uguna Waterfall loop&lt;/a&gt; can be completed in under an hour, while longer, difficult routes such as the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/6976746" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Gorbea Summit Cross loop&lt;/a&gt; can take over 5 hours.
tips: Wetland located in the place that was occupied by an old peat bog that was exploited until its complete elimination in the 70s and 80s of the 20th century.
In the rainy season the waterfall is beautiful, it is easily reached from Saldropo without any difficulty.
